can_begin.tooltip: Initialize the CAN bus at the selected bit rate.

can_available.message0: There are new messages to read on the CAN bus
can_available.tooltip: Check whether a new message is available in the CAN receive buffer.

can_read.tooltip: Read one CAN message and store it in the selected variable.

can_create_message.tooltip: Create a CAN message from the specified identifier and byte array.

can_write.tooltip: Send the specified CAN message on the bus.

can_get_message_id.message0: Get the ID of CAN message %1
can_get_message_id.tooltip: Return the identifier of the selected CAN message.

can_get_message_data.message0: Get the data bytes of CAN message %1 %2
can_get_message_data.tooltip: Return the data byte at the specified index in the selected CAN message.

can_set_filter_mask.tooltip: Set the mask for the standard-frame or extended-frame filter.

can_set_filter_id.tooltip: Set the matching identifier for the standard-frame or extended-frame filter.
